package pages

type Payload {
  message: string
  count: int
  enabled: bool
}

export component Document(markup: string, css: string, javascript: string, payload: Payload): html {
{RawHTML(markup)}
<style>{RawCSS(css)}</style>
<script>{RawJavaScript(javascript)}</script>
<script>window.payload = {JsonForScript(payload)};</script>
}
